changes: Extended `evals/semi_real_probes/manifest.json` with a document-level `jpeg_blocking` withholding probe built from the real Maria Chen sample.

Strengthened withholding parser priors so compressed OCR can recover `signature_date`, `residency_country`, and `residency_country_code` from noisy full-text candidates even when the region OCR is degraded.
Recorded the measured `jpeg_blocking` field-group delta in `evals/augmentation_effects/ledger.json` and left the probe comparison reports under `evals/reports/withholding_jpeg_blocking_probe_*`.

kept: withholding jpeg-blocking parser prior for `signature_date`, `residency_country`, and `residency_country_code`
document-level `jpeg_blocking` probe as a tracked semi-real regression case
discarded: treating parser-only recovery as sufficient for the full `jpeg_blocking` case while `TIN`, names, and address still fail
promoting the `jpeg_blocking` candidate as an end-to-end accuracy fix before recognizer/data improvements exist

next_priorities: Add a `stamp_shadow` or `overlay_patch` withholding probe to isolate whether applicant-name/date failures under occlusion are parser-recoverable or recognizer-only.
Backfill at least one reviewed non-eval withholding front-side sample so region recognizer candidates can move beyond the current zero-val-sample blocker.
